Container.Name: Grimoire
Container.Overview: Grimoire is a self-hosted organizer for your TTRPG content and campaigns. Manage PDFs, maps, tokens, audio, with full-text search, page viewer, campaigns wiki, and more. Perfect for tabletop RPG enthusiasts.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: ttrpg rpg library pdf maps tokens audio opds

Config.Name: Library Path
Config.Description: Path to your TTRPG library folder (books, maps, tokens, audio). Read-only recommended.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent data: database, thumbnails, cache. Backup this!

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Required: Long random string for JWT. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public base URL (e.g. https://grimoire.example.com) for absolute links like OPDS.
